title: Military Correction Facility 63
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Correction}}
'''Military Correction Facility 63''' or '''MCF 63''' was a prison that was part of the base established on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Milagro/Legends|Milagro]] by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], three months before the [[battle in the Milagro system]].<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

It was maintained by [[detainment droid]]s. Thanks to the planet's thin [[atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] and the prisoners's inability to escape, they were allowed to work without leg irons. Although the prisoners were always ordered and expected to hurry up, eventually they always had to wait for the officers.<ref name="JK" />

[[Alfonso Luiz Obota]] was interred there for mutiny. Obota and other prisoners worked for the installation of a communication's mast on the level fused glass, the remnants of the buildings after [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] bombardment.<ref name="JK" />

Its headquarters were in building twenty-three. A prefab building like the rest of the base, the headquarters had interior structures, corridors, doors of [[fiberboard]]. At the first hall a read board scroll a list of prohibitions which extended to the floor. The deck consisted of fiber foam. The interior had a green [[color/Legends|color]]. It was there where Obota was summoned and interviewed by [[Jan Ors]] and [[Kyle Katarn]] and recruited for the [[Mission to Ruusan]].<ref name="JK" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''
